/usr/bin/g++-11 -fPIC -O3 -shared -Wl,-soname,libmv-video-capture.so -o libmv-video-capture.so CMakeFiles/mv-video-capture.dir/camera/mv_video_capture.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/3rdparty/foxglove/lib:/usr/local/lib:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/3rdparty/mindvision/linux/lib/x64 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 ../../3rdparty/mindvision/linux/lib/x64/libMVSDK.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.5 -Wl,--as-needed
